description: Monitors cert-manager health: certificate status, controller performance, ACME operations, webhook health, work queue, and resource usage. Scrape cert-manager port 9402 via OTel Collector Prometheus receiver.
title: cert-manager Monitoring

widgets.description: Total certificates tracked by cert-manager. Sum of ready_status across all condition values equals total cert count (exactly one condition = 1 per cert).
widgets.title: Total Certificates

widgets.description: Certificates currently in Ready condition (actively serving TLS).
widgets.title: Ready Certificates

widgets.description: Certificates with condition=False. Non-zero indicates issuance or renewal failure.
widgets.title: Not Ready Certificates

widgets.description: Current number of admission requests being processed by the cert-manager webhook.
widgets.title: Webhook Requests In-Flight

widgets.description: Ready condition value per certificate over time (1=ready, 0=not ready). Drops indicate issuance or renewal failures.
widgets.title: Certificate Ready Status per Cert

widgets.description: Count of not-ready certificates grouped by namespace. Growing values indicate systemic issuance problems.
widgets.title: Not Ready Certificates by Namespace

widgets.description: Rate of sync() calls per controller per second. Spikes may indicate high reconciliation load.
widgets.title: Controller Sync Call Rate

widgets.description: Rate of sync() errors per controller per second. Sustained errors indicate reconciliation problems.
widgets.title: Controller Sync Error Rate

widgets.description: Rate of outbound ACME HTTP requests per action (getNonce, createOrder, finalizeOrder, etc.).
widgets.title: ACME Request Rate by Action

widgets.description: Rate of ACME requests returning non-2xx HTTP status codes per action. Persistent errors indicate ACME provider issues.
widgets.title: ACME Error Rate (non-2xx) by Action

widgets.description: Average ACME HTTP request duration per action. Computed from Summary .sum / .count rate.
widgets.title: ACME Average Request Duration by Action

widgets.description: Rate of admission webhook requests grouped by HTTP response status code.
widgets.title: Webhook Request Rate by Status Code

widgets.description: Average admission webhook processing latency computed from histogram .sum / .count rates.
widgets.title: Webhook Average Admission Latency

widgets.description: Current item count in each controller work queue. Growing depth indicates processing backlog.
widgets.title: Work Queue Depth by Controller

widgets.description: Rate of items enqueued per controller queue per second.
widgets.title: Work Queue Add Rate by Controller

widgets.description: CPU core utilization rate per cert-manager component (controller, webhook, cainjector).
widgets.title: CPU Usage by Component

widgets.description: Resident set size (RSS) memory per cert-manager component in bytes.
widgets.title: Memory Usage by Component
